title: Command Center — Local scheduler tick and run history
summary: This feature delivery ships local automation execution and append-only JSONL run history for Command Center. The @pancreator/scheduler package gains due evaluation, concurrency locks, run-log I/O, and tick orchestration under .pan/scheduler/. The CLI exposes pnpm -w exec pan scheduler tick with optional --id for…
planning_context: handoff.handoff_note: Feature index links delivery report, accepted ship artifacts, and active work paths. After human acceptance, SDK advances to complete and delegates close-artifacts archival to librarian.

intake.human_approval_note: Supervisor ship ratification at 2026-06-08T16:30:00Z with human_ratified_diff true; 34 touch-set paths staged plus 49 bundled sibling Command Center infrastructure files on command-center-overhaul; compliance audit…
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
